base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of palette_overworld_underground_underwater_castle — a ui from 1985 super mario bros. Reference palette strip — 4 color-slot states for the player sprite across different level types: overworld / underground / underwater / castle. Drives per-zone hue shift at load-time, not per-frame animation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
